source_description: In an apartment kitchen, Rachel stands by the counter holding a wine glass. Ross stands facing her. A male voiceover is heard.
The voiceover says, "Previously on Friends." Ross steps forward and says, "I don't even feel like I have a girlfriend anymore."
The voiceover says, "Previously on Friends." Ross steps forward and says, "I don't even feel like I have a girlfriend anymore."
